name: add_fact
description: Add a new atomic fact to a knowledge graph entity. Use this to record new information about a person, project, or concept. Facts are stored in items.json and auto-assigned incremental IDs (e.g., safa-001). For updating existing facts, use supersede_fact instead.

name: supersede_fact
description: Supersede an old fact by marking it as superseded and adding a new fact. Use this when information has changed and you want to maintain history rather than deleting facts. The old fact's status changes to 'superseded' and links to the new fact via supersededBy. For adding completely new facts without superseding, use add_fact instead.

old.description: ID of the fact to supersede (e.g., 'safa-002')

name: summarize_entity
description: Regenerate an entity summary markdown file (summary.md) from all active facts. Use this to create or refresh a human-readable overview of an entity based on its current active facts. The summary includes the entity name, update date, and bullet points of active facts sorted by timestamp.
